gates.name: upstream_capacity_and_decay_pass
gates.reason: Capacity status capacity_depth_missing_or_not_positive; decay status decay_survival_blocked.

gates.name: controlled_cluster_share_limit
gates.reason: Largest controlled cluster share None; max is 0.35.

gates.name: no_usable_sizing_or_execution
gates.reason: Cluster-control report remains research-only with zero usable rows and no sizing or execution.

method.boundary: Controlled depth is capacity accounting for a future paper overlay, not sizing or staking guidance.
method.cluster_key: asset_symbol + contract_family + close_time bucket from the upstream CCD report.
method.control_rule: Positive-depth capacity may advance only when the selected clusters can satisfy the configured maximum share. With a single positive cluster and max share below 1, controlled capacity is zero.
method.row_order_rule: Within each cluster, rows are retained by descending margin, then contract ticker.

next_action.name: kalshi_crypto_proxy_correlation_cluster_control_audit
next_action.stop_condition: Stop before paper overlay, sizing, execution, or account/order paths.
next_action.why: Cluster control is blocked by missing or upstream-invalid CCD evidence.
